mcqs.question: What is the purpose of the popen function in C programming?

options.text: A. To create a pipe between the calling process and a child process
B. To execute a command and read or write data to or from the child process
C. To close the pipe and wait for the child process to terminate
D. To communicate with remote processes

mcqs.explanation: The popen function is used to execute a command and read or write data to or from the child process.

mcqs.question: What is the type parameter in the popen function used for?

options.text: A. To specify the command to be executed by the child process
B. To specify the type of I/O to be performed on the pipe
C. To specify the return value of the popen function
D. To specify the pclose function to be used

mcqs.explanation: The type parameter in the popen function is used to specify the type of I/O to be performed on the pipe. It can be either "r" for reading or "w" for writing.

mcqs.question: What is the return value of the popen function?

options.text: A. A pointer to a FILE object
B. An integer value
C. A character string
D. A boolean value

mcqs.explanation: The popen function returns a pointer to a FILE object that can be used to read or write data to or from the child process.

mcqs.question: What is the pclose function used for?

options.text: A. To create a pipe between the calling process and a child process
B. To execute a command and read or write data to or from the child process
C. To close the pipe and wait for the child process to terminate
D. To communicate with remote processes

mcqs.explanation: The pclose function is used to close the pipe and wait for the child process to terminate.

mcqs.question: What are some common use cases for the popen function?

options.text: A. Shell scripting and system programming
B. Network programming
C. Database programming
D. Web development

mcqs.explanation: The popen function is commonly used in shell scripting and system programming to execute commands and read or write data to or from the child process. It is also used in network programming to communicate with remote processes.
